titleStmt.title: Mararā, ʿƎndā Mikāʾel, Donald Davies Mararā 1
Miracles of Mary

publicationStmt.publisher: Die Schriftkultur des christlichen Äthiopiens und Eritreas: Eine multimediale Forschungsumgebung / Beta maṣāḥǝft

availability.licence: This file is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0.

msItem.title: Taʾammǝra Māryām
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Hildephonsus (Dexius) of Toledo
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of an evil officer at Tarsus in Cilicia who loved Mary and had an apparition of Jesus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Qirās, a brigand of Galatia, saved by Mary from hanging
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the sinful deacon ʾAstirās whom Mary ordered to be buried in the believers' graveyard
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a shipwrecked pilgrim
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a prince saved by Mary after being punished for having wrongly assigned an abbot
Miracle of Mary: How the painted figures of Christ and the Virgin Mary bled when a Jew cast the board into a pit, how the magistrate burned the Jew alive
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved the soul of a monk who was crossing a stream to visit a lover
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary converted a demented herdsman and delivered him from Satan
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a monk in the monastery of St. Ephrem, on an island in the river of Tigris
Miracle of Mary: How a knight loved a lady and prayed to Mary who appeared to him and how he became a monk
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary told a treasurer of a church to kiss her cheeks
Miracle of Mary: How a merchant denied Christ but not Mary, who saved him
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary caused a storm to cease and saved sheep and took the shepherd to Paradise
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary with shrouded face was seen by a collector of firewood who acquired wealth through her protection
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a brigand who loved Mary and whose funeral she commanded to the bishop
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a picture of Mary speaking to a worker
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Leo)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a baptized Jewish boy called Gǝrānin saved by Mary from fire
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary raised a dead knight to fight against Golyād
Miracle of Mary: How an Ishmaelite was converted when he saw oil and milk flowing from the breasts of a picture of the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary appeared to a young man and made him swear he would not marry and how he ran away after his father chose a bride and broke his neck
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained forgiveness for a spendthrift because though he denied the Father, Christ, the Holy Ghost and the angels he would not deny her
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved a lady from adultery by causing her to read the Prayers for the Dead and appeared to her
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jew of ʾAḫmīm
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the scribe Damianus from Philippi
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Bishop of Rome, ʾAbbās (Leo)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of ʾArsimā, whom Mary announced that two girls would be exempted from wordly desires
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a sinful woman who swallowed a scorpion
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary administered to certain monks a celestial compound to digest their food
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary rebuked a woman who gave up fasting at her husband's command
Miracle of Mary: How a wealthy lady who dressed in mean attire to give alms was carried to Church by the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and our Lord became sureties to a Jew for the debt owed to him by a certain merchant of Constantinople
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the drunk monk Timotewos (?), saved by the Virgin
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of sunken ship saved by Mary
Miracle of Mary: How a woman consigned to the Devil the son she conceived on Easter eve
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a sinful widow who went to hell and later appeared at her convent and announced her salvation by Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a widow whom Mary told never to recite the greeting of the angel in hurry
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a knight who denied Jesus but not Mary and was saved by her intercession
Miracle of Mary: How a great king in Rome dedicated an altar to Virgin Mary and Her Child
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the transmigration of the Virgin, meeting with St John
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of George the Younger, who was delivered from prison
Miracle of Mary: The Muslims who spent the night at the ruins of Dabra Mǝṭmāq
Miracle of Mary: How Nicodemus the Persian knight became a Christian
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the Phoenician evil man called Bārok
Pilgrim to Santiago: Part 1: The bishop for whom the Virgin Mary tailored a new sackcloth sends a penitent pilgrim to Santiago (whole or opening)
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Anastasius, a deacon of Rome
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained forgiveness for a monk who mutilated himself after he had defiled himself
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop removed a priest from his office and how the Virgin Mary rebuked the bishop
Miracle of Mary: How a shoemaker's daughter called Mary was taken possession of a horse-solder, who spared her virginity
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jewish boy from Tyrus, saved by Mary from the furnace
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a pregnant woman
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a shipwrecked pilgrim
Miracle of Mary: How a man forsook his wife and loved another woman who was a worshipper of the Virgin Mary and repented
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Dina resurrected and released from the Hades by St. Mary
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor widow and her son who became a thief and was crucified
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Juliana and Barbara from Bethlehem
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of Theodosia, sister of Constantine, who found the cross in Jerusalem
A pregnant abbess is secretly delivered of her son by the Virgin Mary and he grows up to become a bishop
Miracle of Mary: How a widow forsook her duties in the Church and lived in sin, how her place had been filled by the Virgin Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and her Son appeared in a beehive
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary sent a vision to a young man and caused him to embrace the ascetic life
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary protected a philantropic merchant who had beggared himself
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a nobleman who established a hospital and took Satan as assistant
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from the devils the soul of an avaricious farmer who had given alms in her name
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a Jew of Constantinople punished for throwing out an image of Mary
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary forgave a lady who commited incest with her son and murdered their child
Miracle of Mary: How a young man placed a ring on the finger of a figure of the Virgin Mary, who regarded it as a ring of betrothal
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary and St Peter saved from hell the souls of Peter the deacon and Stephen, two brothers from Constantinople
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from hell the soul of an evil man who had intended to build a church in her name
Miracle of Mary: How a bishop from St Peter's church in Rome stole holy oil and bought two pearls for Mary after having been rebuked
Miracle of Mary: How an avaricious priest refused to leave the bed of a rich man to go to a dying woman
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary saved a young widow from a knight, who became a monk
Miracle of Mary: The Story of the Cannibal of Qǝmr
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the youth Zechariah, from Rome
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary kept alive miners buried in a fall of earth
Miracle of Mary: The cupbearer of the king of France
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a French painter whose scaffold was overthrown by the devil
A bankrupt husband who denied Christ and befriended Satan, who promised him great wealth, but was stopped by the Virgin Mary in his wife's guise
Miracle of Mary: Miracles of the apparition of the Virgin to a sculptor and St Basil
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary made the tears of a sinful maiden to outweigh her sins
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a European man with a petrified foot
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary, when twelve years old, healed an epileptic
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the source caused by Jesus and healing by its water
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a brigand who bathed in "the water of the Virgin" and whose soul was saved by Her
Miracle of Mary: The brigands who killed each other at the miraculous spring
Miracle of Mary: The Virgin Mary and the man who went mad
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary made a stream to reverse its course
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the healing of a handicapped man
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of the construction of a church in Jericho
Miracle of a sick man in a hospital whom Mary carries to Jerusalem
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary caused the spirits of Macarius and others to appear to the monks of Scete
Miracle of Mary: An abbot in Scete sees first a multitude of demons, then a multitude of saints
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered a Muslim from prison and how he escaped to Cyprus
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a rich man from Qʷalāsis who fought the Qʷǝz and whose eye was pierced by an arrow
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a woman who prayed for a child and sees three sons in an apparition
Miracle of Mary: The girl who was going to be stoned after she was caught committing fornication
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary fed the starving monks
A monk is saved him from being deceived by Satan when the Virgin Mary appears
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor monk whom Mary gave a garment
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary healed a leper on the day of her festival
Miracle of Mary: The Virgin Mary and the wife who was an adultress
Miracle of Mary: The king's washerman who was attacked by a lion
Miracle of Mary: A young man whom his mother had vowed to the service of St Mary becomes impotent when his parents try to wed him
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary delivered from prison a wrongly accused governor
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a poor man who wanted to build a Chapel to Mary and of the buried pot of gold pieces
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary fought against an ape and delivered a huntsman from death
Miracle of Mary: How an image of the Virgin Mary wept for the sins of the world
Miracle of Mary: The man who wanted to give a banquet on St Mary's feast but was unable because of a famine
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary healed a sick man by anointing him with her spittle
Miracle of Mary: How the monks of a certain monastery reviled their abbot, whom the Virgin Mary carried to paradise
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a bandit saved by Mary after having stolen from churches
Miracle of Mary: Miracle of a fisherman who adored the Virgin Mary and was saved from snake
Miracle of Mary: How the Virgin Mary obtained entry to paradise for the soul of a monk who had kept her fast annually
Miracle of Mary: A sinner is saved from damnation because he had built a shrine in the name of St Mary
Miracle of Mary: The hungry man whom St Mary used to feed
Miracle of Mary: A soldier redeems the Child Jesus from another soldier who was thinking of handing him over to King Herod
Miracle of Mary: How a man collapsed whilst on his way to receive the Eucharist
Saint Thecla: Part 1: Thecla is taken to Alexandria to see her brother, Abba Esi, in a boat guided by the Archangels Gabriel and Sureyal.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)
